name: Inaba Foods Cat Treat Grilled Tuna In Homestyle Broth
description: Treat your cat to the delicious taste of Inaba Foods Grilled Tuna in Homestyle Broth a premium, hand-cut tuna fillet made from wholesome, high-quality ingredients. Each lightly grilled fillet is packed in a savory broth to lock in moisture, helping to keep your feline hydrated and happy. Crafted with natural wild-caught tuna, vacuum-sealed in UV-blocking packaging to maintain freshness and flavor, this cat treat is free from grains, artificial colors, and preservatives. Enriched with Vitamin E for immunity and Green Tea Extract as an antioxidant, it’s a healthy indulgence your cat will love. Perfect for handfeeding, as a topper for wet or dry food, or as a special reward, these flaky tuna fillets bring variety and excitement to your cat’s daily routine. Suitable for cats of all life stages, from kittens to seniors. Key Benefits . Made with natural wild-caught tuna . Helps support hydration with moisture-rich broth . Grain-free, preservative-free, and no artificial colors . Enriched with Vitamin E & Green Tea Extract antioxidants . Perfect for handfeeding, topper, or treat . Vacuum-sealed for freshness . Suitable for kittens, adults, and senior cats Ingredients Tuna, Natural Tuna Flavored Broth, Natural Kelp Flavored Broth, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 26.5% Crude Fat (min): 0.8% Crude Fiber (max): 0.5% Moisture (max): 71% Vitamin E (min): 14 IU/kg Calories: 1277 kcal/kg | 19 kcal per piece Net Weight: 0.52 oz per fillet Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only, not as a complete meal. Provide clean, fresh water daily. Storage Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible for maximum freshness.
